title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: BEAVERTON WELLNESS CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 2725 SW Cedar Hills Boulevard Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm (503) 352-6000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 352-6000 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Beaverton SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet #67 stop at Jenkins & Cedar Hills Crossing Driveway Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BCCTP HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WELLNESS CENTER SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEAVERTON WELLNESS CENTER
